note_en: Neutral tape: SPY/QQQ flat-to-down on Big Tech earnings jitters (GOOGL, TSLA, NOW slipped) and rising yields/oil, while single-stock catalysts (WAB, SMCI, AT&T) offered the day's real trade setups.
note_zh: 大盘中性:科技巨头财报承压(谷歌、特斯拉、ServiceNow 下跌)叠加油价与美债收益率走高,标普/纳指窄幅波动,但个股催化剂(WAB、SMCI、AT&T)提供了今日真正的交易机会。

S.thesis_en: Wabtec beat Q2 EPS ($2.76 vs $2.63 est) and revenue ($3.18B, +17.5% YoY), then raised FY2026 EPS guidance to $10.60-$10.90 -- confirmed-event momentum drove the stock +9.6-10% on real volume Jul 22, with at least one analyst target hike to $340 following.
S.thesis_zh: Wabtec 二季度每股收益(2.76美元 vs 预期2.63美元)和营收(31.8亿美元,同比+17.5%)均超预期,并将2026全年每股收益指引上调至10.60-10.90美元——利好兑现推动股价7/22放量上涨9.6%-10%,随后至少一家机构将目标价上调至340美元。
signals: earnings-beat: Q2 adj. EPS $2.76 vs $2.63 est (+4.9%), revenue $3.18B vs $3.08B est
guidance-raise: FY2026 adj. EPS raised to $10.60-$10.90 from $10.25-$10.65

P.thesis_en: SMCI disclosed over $60B in new FY26 Q4 orders plus a gross-margin guide raise (8.2-8.4% to 15-17%) tied to a new SpaceX/xAI AI-datacenter project, gapping up and running as much as +26.6% intraday on Jul 22 on heavy volume -- textbook gap-and-surge structure for the intraday book, with a tight 1-day exitBy given the size of the move already banked.
P.thesis_zh: SMCI 披露2026财年第四季度新增订单超600亿美元,并将毛利率指引从8.2%-8.4%大幅上调至15%-17%,与新的SpaceX/xAI人工智能数据中心项目相关,7/22 放量跳空高开、盘中一度暴涨26.6%——是盘中结构账本的典型缺口+放量结构,鉴于涨幅已经兑现较多,设置了较紧的1个交易日 exitBy。
signals: gap-up-breakout: opened 28.89 vs prior close 25.50, +19.8% on the day
volume-surge: intraday range 28.50-32.28 on record order-backlog news

T.thesis_en: Two independent signals converge: a real subscriber-driven earnings beat (Q2 adj. EPS $0.65 vs $0.59 est, 432k postpaid phone net adds vs ~338.5k est) and a raised 2026 buyback target to ~$10B from $8B (management citing undervaluation) -- fusion, not a single headline, fits Model T's mandate, and today (Thursday) is one of its two allowed open-window days.
T.thesis_zh: 两条独立信号同时出现:实打实的用户驱动型财报超预期(二季度调整后每股收益0.65美元 vs 预期0.59美元,后付费用户净增43.2万,高于预期的约33.85万)以及2026年回购目标从80亿美元上调至约100亿美元(管理层称股价被低估)——信号融合而非单一头条,契合 Model T 定位,今天(周四)恰好是其两个允许开仓日之一。
signals: earnings-beat-subscriber-adds: Q2 adj. EPS $0.65 vs $0.59 est, 432k postpaid phone net adds vs ~338.5k est
buyback-authorization-increase: 2026 repurchase target raised to ~$10B from $8B, citing undervaluation
